response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad full-stack and polyglot engineering experience with solid software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and some exposure to high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis — all core requirements for this Principal/IC6 growth-engineering role. Title progression (Senior, briefly Staff) and scope of impact described do not clearly demonstrate Principal-level cross-org technical leadership over multi-team platform initiatives.
strengths: Polyglot engineer with production experience across TypeScript/Node, C/C++, Java, and DLang at relevant scale
Strong craftsmanship background — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, mentoring, and workshop delivery
Prior low-latency, high-throughput microservices work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of req/s
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, or A/B test analysis
Limited evidence of Principal/IC6-level scope: no clear multi-team platform ownership or cross-org influence
Weak signal on data aptitude, metrics/telemetry platforms, and statistical methods required for the role

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot engineering and craftsmanship foundation
